title: "Riot faerie" [Sketches in pen]
description: "On a purple sticky note is 2 drawings in black pen of a fairy with messy pigtails and a 'Grrrl' t-shirt. On the pink sticky note is a cartoon in black pen of Kurusu laughing in the driver's seat of a convertible, presumably a getway car, long hair flowing in the wind. In their glee, they have abandoned the steering wheel, forcing Akechi to grab it from the passenger seat, an annoyed scowl on his face. The text below the cartoon is at odds with his expression and betray his fondness. On the memo pad paper beneath are several doodles in black pen: Akechi hunched over, depressed; below is another angle of the Kurusu and Akechi sticky note drawing; at the bottom of the page, a doodle of 3 cats, half covered-up by a sticky note."
subject: fairies; riot grrrl movement; Kurusu Akira; Akechi Goro; AkeShu (relationship); drag performance; cats; anxiety; queer desire
text: "[on sticky note] Riot faerie"; "[on sticky note] [Akira:] HAHAHAHAA / [Akechi's narration] ooo I'm so far gone."; "[at top of page] I'm always nervous."; "[below on page] [Akechi's narration] What you do to me is indescribable"
note: Two Post-It notes on yellow memo pad paper.

title: "Hey, man, we all cant be like you"
description: "A two panel comic of Akechi and Kurusu on a date at the aquarium, drawn in black ink on teal paper. The lyrics above and below provide context for the scene. Kurusu watches fish swim in the tank; Akechi watches her, yearning for and envying her with her simple joy. Blush was drawn on both faces in pink marker. Additional text was omitted using Wite-Out."

title: "I kiss her and know he's done this too"
description: "The first half of the page includes a two panel comic of Akechi kissing Kurusu. The first panel is mostly un-inked and sketched in pencil. Akechi holds Kurusu's face in his gloved hand, the only object in the panel inked in black marker. The second panel, a close-up on Akechi's hand on Kurusu's chin and their smirking red lips, is rendered in full color. The text above and below narrate Akechi's conflicting feelings and jealousy. On the other half of the page is a portrait in marker of Akechi adjusting his glove. His face is drawn on an additional piece of paper that has been taped to the page as a new layer."
subject: fan art; Akechi Goro; Kurusu Akira; AkeShu (relationship); jealousy; queer desire
text: "[above panel 1] I KISS HER & KNOW HE'S DONE THIS TOO / & I CAN'T HELP BUT FEEL [unintelligible] [below panel 2]"

title: [Textless AkeShu comic]
description: "The first half of the page features a textless two panel comic of Akechi and Kurusu in pen and marker. In the first panel, Akechi says something to Kurusu; the blank speech bubble leaves this to the reader's imagination. The second panel is a close-up of Kurusu's reaction to whatever Akechi said: their eyes intense and brow furrowed, likely in irritation or hurt. On the other half of the page is a drawing in marker of Kurusu in their school uniform, their expression unreadable due to the glare on their glasses. The bottom half of the drawing is unfinished and drawn only in pencil."

title: "Tu tanta falta de querer" [Comic and illustration]
description: "The first half of the page is two unfinished comics. A sticky note covers sketches of the first panels. Kurusu reminisces about a past lover, crying. In the second, they imagine a past lover hovering over them in menacing shadow; they smoke a cigarette to cope with, and perhaps relive, the pain. A related panel in the top right features a gloved hand looking into the doorway of an office, looking in unseen. An illustration of Jude in her cheerleading outfit takes up the bottom left."
